description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot, featuring a flat roof and surrounded by a low boundary wall. The front of the property faces a paved road and includes a driveway leading to a gated entrance, with a pathway flanked by manicured hedges. The garden areas are landscaped with green lawns, palm trees, and a cluster of taller trees at the rear, providing privacy and shade. The building itself is compact, with clean lines and a minimalist design, and large windows are visible on the front and side facades. The property includes a detached structure at the rear, possibly a garage or storage unit, and the overall layout is open and accessible. The exterior materials appear to be primarily concrete or stucco, with wooden or metal accents for the fencing and gates.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped gardens, and a gated driveway, surrounded by a low wall and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, manicured hedges, and the road-facing facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long boundary wall, side lawn, palm tree, and the arrangement of windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cluster of tall trees, detached rear structure, and the back garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, palm trees, and the length of the property along the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
